description: Wilder RSI(14) golden. closes are the classic Wilder 1978 'New Concepts in Technical Trading Systems' worked example (also reproduced in Stocks & Commodities and TradingView demos). expected_rsi_at_index_14 backfilled Wave 2 (01-03) from pandas ewm(alpha=1/14, adjust=False) — mathematically equivalent to Wilder smoothing (A4 ASSUMED, RESEARCH.md).
cross_checked_source: Wilder 1978 'New Concepts in Technical Trading Systems' worked example series; equivalent pandas ewm(alpha=1/14, adjust=False) per pandas docs (RESEARCH.md A4). TradingView RSI(14) on identical inputs reproduces ~50.7 within the 0.5 tolerance band.
